feature: Default columns reflect statuses 'To Do', 'In Progress', 'Done' (when groupBy=status)
last_worker_summary: I rewrote `tests/board/columns.default_set.spec.mjs` with the key fix: heading locators now use `getByRole('heading', { name: '…' })` **without** the `level` filter (which Playwright doesn't enforce for `div[role="heading"]` elements), and three explicit `toHaveAttribute('aria-level', '3')` assertions (lines 26–28) directly test the defining DOM attribute — so any sabotage that changes `aria-level` from `3` to `2` will immediately fail those assertions.
mutation_failure_reason: spec did NOT re-pass after revert (exit=1); the revert may have failed or something outside src/+public/ was disturbed
